_W003_ARCHIVE_NOTICE: This file is ARCHIVED and NOT used at runtime.
The runtime MCP config is generated by write_mcp_config() in app.py
and written to /tmp/mcp_runtime.json at the start of every audit.
Removed entries (kept here for historical reference only):
- atheris-fuzzer      (requires Clang+libFuzzer, unavailable on HF Spaces)
_comment: Actual runtime config is written to /tmp/mcp_runtime.json at startup.
Secrets injected from HF Space env vars — never committed.
FETCH_ALLOWED_DOMAINS prevents SSRF against internal services.
Rhodawk AI v6.0 — 37 cybersecurity MCP server suite (12 new in v6 per Masterplan §8).

fetch-docs.description: Fetch security docs, CVE advisories, exploit PoCs, and vendor bulletins

github-manager.description: GitHub API: create PRs, open security advisories, manage issues, query commit history

filesystem-research.description: Read-only access to cloned repos, research scratch space, and findings output

memory-store.description: Persistent knowledge graph — stores exploit chains, CWE patterns, and cross-session vulnerability memory

sequential-thinking.description: Structured chain-of-thought for complex multi-step vulnerability analysis and exploit reasoning

web-search.description: Search CVEs, exploit PoCs, vendor advisories, bug bounty writeups, and security research papers

git-forensics.description: Deep git history analysis: silent security patches (CAD), blame tracking, commit anomaly detection

postgres-intelligence.description: Query findings DB, scan history, and vulnerability intelligence store

sqlite-findings.description: Local findings store — fast queries on vulnerability metadata, CVSS scores, and bounty estimates

nuclei-scanner.description: Nuclei template-based vulnerability scanner — DAST, CVE detection, misconfig scanning

semgrep-sast.description: Semgrep SAST — taint analysis, CWE pattern matching, secrets detection across 30+ languages

trufflehog-secrets.description: TruffleHog v3 — high-signal secret scanning with 700+ detectors across git history

bandit-sast.description: Bandit Python SAST — AST-level detection of dangerous patterns, injection sinks, insecure APIs

pip-audit-sca.description: pip-audit SCA — known vulnerabilities in Python dependencies via OSV and PyPI Advisory DB

osv-scanner.description: OSV Scanner — multi-ecosystem SCA using the Open Source Vulnerability database (Google)

z3-formal-verifier.description: Z3 SMT solver — formal verification of integer bounds, overflow invariants, protocol properties

hypothesis-fuzzer.description: Hypothesis PBT fuzzer — property-based testing for arithmetic overflow, encoding, aliasing bugs

atheris-fuzzer.description: Atheris coverage-guided fuzzer — libFuzzer-backed Python fuzzing for parser and protocol bugs

angr-symbolic.description: angr symbolic execution — binary analysis, path exploration, constraint solving for native exploits

radon-complexity.description: Radon AST complexity analysis — cyclomatic complexity, Halstead metrics, attack surface ranking

ruff-linter.description: Ruff ultra-fast Python linter — detects anti-patterns that correlate with security bugs

aider-patcher.description: Aider AI code editor — applies LLM-generated patches with diff verification and test re-run

cve-intelligence.description: NVD/NIST CVE API — fetch full CVE details, CVSS vectors, CWE mappings, affected versions

bounty-platform.description: Bug bounty platform APIs — HackerOne report submission, GitHub Security Advisories, Bugcrowd

supply-chain-monitor.description: Supply chain security — PyPI typosquatting, dependency confusion, malicious package detection

static-analysis-mcp.description: Mythos: Tree-sitter CPG, Joern, CodeQL, Semgrep — deep semantic static analysis

dynamic-analysis-mcp.description: Mythos: AFL++, KLEE, QEMU, Frida, GDB — coverage-guided + symbolic + instrumented dynamic analysis

exploit-generation-mcp.description: Mythos: Pwntools, ROPGadget, heap kit, privesc KB — autonomous PoC synthesis

vulnerability-database-mcp.description: Mythos: NVD, OSV, Exploit-DB lookup for prior-art correlation

web-security-mcp.description: Mythos: OWASP ZAP, nuclei, sqlmap orchestration for web targets

browser-agent-mcp.description: ARCHITECT: Playwright-driven live browser for web app testing (navigate/click/inject/screenshot)

scope-parser-mcp.description: ARCHITECT: HackerOne / Bugcrowd / Intigriti scope ingestion for night-mode

subdomain-enum-mcp.description: ARCHITECT: subfinder + amass + dnsx + crt.sh subdomain enumeration

httpx-probe-mcp.description: ARCHITECT: httpx live-host probe + tech fingerprint

wayback-mcp.description: ARCHITECT: Wayback / CommonCrawl historical URL recall

frida-runtime-mcp.description: ARCHITECT: live Frida instrumentation sessions (mobile / native runtime)

ghidra-bridge-mcp.description: ARCHITECT: headless Ghidra / radare2 binary analysis bridge

sdr-analysis-mcp.description: ARCHITECT: GNU Radio / rtl_sdr scripted RF capture & analysis

skill-selector-mcp.description: Rhodawk: semantic skill selection (MiniLM) — brain extension on demand

trufflehog-deep-mcp.description: TruffleHog deep scan over full git history (all commit depths)

gitleaks-mcp.description: Gitleaks — complementary secret scanner with custom rules

semgrep-pro-patterns-mcp.description: Semgrep with p/security-audit + p/owasp-top-ten + p/cwe-top-25 rulesets

jwt-analyzer-mcp.description: JWT alg:none, weak-secret brute, key confusion, missing exp/nbf

openapi-analyzer-mcp.description: Parse OpenAPI/Swagger and enumerate attack surface

cors-analyzer-mcp.description: CORS misconfiguration: origin reflection, null origin, wildcard+credentials
